title: T2SCH8 Capital Cost Allowance (CCA) - Canada.ca
content:
## T2SCH8 Capital Cost Allowance (CCA)
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
This schedule is used by corporations to calculate capital cost allowances (CCA), recapture of CCA, and terminal losses.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open fillable PDFs in Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF (t2sch8-fill-26e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2024 – Fillable PDF (t2sch8-fill-24e.pdf) 2022 – Fillable PDF (t2sch8-fill-22e.pdf) 2020 – Fillable PDF (t2sch8-fill-20e.pdf) 2019 – Fillable PDF (t2sch8-fill-19e.pdf) 2017 – Fillable PDF (t2sch8-fill-17e.pdf) 2014 – Fillable PDF (t2sch8-fill-14e.pdf) 2011 – Fillable PDF (t2sch8-fill-11e.pdf)
